_comment: Deterministic transcription-error fixes applied to YouTube auto-captions. Keys are matched case-insensitively as whole words/phrases (word boundaries); the value is substituted verbatim, so it sets the canonical casing (e.g. acronyms in caps, brands capitalized). Edit freely for your domain — add common mis-hearings on the left, the correct term on the right. Keep keys lowercase. This is applied automatically unless --no-fix is passed; the agent should also proofread remaining context-specific errors.
